dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal specifies 2-day RSI; rsi_7 is the closest available indicator. Entry uses 'crosses_above' operator to capture penetration moving higher through 90 threshold. Exit condition set to 1-day hold (hold_days_max=1) with close on next bar. Entry on next close after signal is handled by backtest engine bar sequencing logic.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal specifies 2-day RSI; rsi_7 is the closest available indicator. Entry uses 'crosses_above' operator to capture penetration moving higher through 90 threshold. Exit condition set to 1-day hold (hold_days_max=1) with close on next bar. Entry on next close after signal is handled by backtest engine bar sequencing logic.

source_rule_text: Sell short on the next close when the 2-day RSI penetrates above the threshold of 90, and exit one day later on the close.
